cases.condition: The source profile, application version, format identity, fixture hash, schema fingerprint, source record key, normalization version, and normalized values all match an existing historical observation.
cases.required_result: Do not add or mutate an observation, event, trace, span, or retention item.

cases.condition: The exact source record and field provenance match, but a normalized field value conflicts with the stored historical observation.
cases.required_result: Preserve the stored value, record a conflict diagnostic without source content, and require an explicit later repair contract.

cases.condition: An explicit existing binding names a strong event and the candidate contributes an allowed historical summary field.
cases.required_result: Attach provenance-scoped historical observation data only; never overwrite strong identity, hierarchy, timing, lifecycle, or event identity.

cases.condition: No explicit event binding exists, even when repository names, times, text, or model values look similar.
cases.required_result: Keep the candidate distinct and unbound; do not infer a trace, span, parent, event, session, or repository relationship.

cases.condition: The candidate does not capture a field already present on an existing observation.
cases.required_result: Preserve the existing value and provenance; absence is not a correction.

cases.condition: A historical field conflicts with an existing normalized or live-capture value.
cases.required_result: Preserve the stronger value and record a field-level conflict without replacing either value or provenance.

cases.condition: Any historical Tier B candidate is accepted by a future supported profile.
cases.required_result: Set completeness to partial and include historical_summary_only; historical data alone can never claim full completeness.

cases.condition: The import captures only normalized summary metadata and no raw or Session event content.
cases.required_result: Store content_state as not_captured and create no content-bearing retention catalog item.

cases.condition: A future supported include-content import has a valid authoritative source time whose raw-default-90d expiry is already reached.
cases.required_result: Deny content reads irreversibly and transactionally advance only through allowed retention states to deletion_queued before the import operation succeeds.

cases.condition: A future supported include-content import has valid authoritative source time and its raw-default-90d expiry remains in the future.
cases.required_result: Create the exact content-bearing item as expiring under raw-default-90d version 1 using the authoritative source time.

cases.condition: An imported item has no explicit user pin mutation.
cases.required_result: Never assign retained_by_policy; that lifecycle state requires the existing explicit pin contract.
